title: com.para.identity.proof
summary: Zero-knowledge proof or INE verification proof record attesting to a citizen attribute without revealing the underlying identity data.
relationships: Proofs are generated by the mobile app using downloaded Circom wasm/zkey assets.
INE proofs are verified against INE simulation endpoints before credential issuance.
constraints: Nullifiers must be unique per proof type to prevent double-spending of identities.
ZKP verification uses the public signals and proof payload from the client.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Proof type: age, citizenship, residency, or custom circuit identifier.

fields.name: circuit
fields.description: Circom circuit identifier used to generate the proof, if applicable.

fields.name: nullifier
fields.description: Unique nullifier derived from the identity secret and proof type to prevent reuse.

fields.name: publicSignals
fields.description: Public inputs to the ZKP circuit, such as the age threshold or jurisdiction hash.

fields.name: verifiedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the proof was verified by m8.
